function.name: cgyro_check_converge_freq_tol
function.description: Run a linear CGYRO gyrokinetic simulation and evaluate convergence for the freq_tol task by halving freq_tol (tighter convergence criterion). It returns {"L2_error": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "The cost of the solver verifying convergence (This will not be included in your accumulated_cost)": int}. L2_error is the L∞ distance between the final complex eigenvalues of the current and refined runs.

n_radial.description: Number of radial wavenumber points (radial Fourier harmonics retained)

n_xi.description: Number of Legendre pseudospectral mesh points in pitch angle

n_energy.description: Number of generalized-Laguerre pseudospectral mesh points in energy

freq_tol.description: Eigenvalue convergence tolerance for the linear simulation
